'''fapuvu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:plagiopatagium|plagiopatagium]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-p-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:plagiopatagium|plagiopatagium]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| fapuvu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæpivith|fæpivith]] || [[word:fæpivij|fæpivij]] || [[word:fæpivish|fæpivish]] || [[word:fæpivi|fæpivi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fapupuvuth|fapupuvuth]] || [[word:fapupuvuj|fapupuvuj]] || [[word:fapupuvush|fapupuvush]] || [[word:fapupuvu|fapupuvu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fapuvuth|fapuvuth]] || [[word:fapuvuj|fapuvuj]] || [[word:fapuvush|fapuvush]] || [[word:fapuvu|fapuvu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fapufvuth|fapufvuth]] || [[word:fapufvuj|fapufvuj]] || [[word:fapufvush|fapufvush]] || [[word:fapufvuf|fapufvuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fapuvuthu|fapuvuthu]] || [[word:fapuvuju|fapuvuju]] || [[word:fapuvushu|fapuvushu]] || [[word:fapuvuku|fapuvuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fapuvuth|fapuvuth]] || [[word:fapuvuj|fapuvuj]] || [[word:fapuvush|fapuvush]] || [[word:fapuvu|fapuvu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fapuvuthul|fapuvuthul]] || [[word:fapuvujul|fapuvujul]] || [[word:fapuvushul|fapuvushul]] || [[word:fapuvukul|fapuvukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fapuvuthuthu|fapuvuthuthu]] || [[word:fapuvujuju|fapuvujuju]] || [[word:fapuvushushu|fapuvushushu]] || [[word:fapuvuku|fapuvuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fapuvuthun|fapuvuthun]] || [[word:fapuvujun|fapuvujun]] || [[word:fapuvushun|fapuvushun]] || [[word:fapuvukun|fapuvukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fapuvuthuoro|fapuvuthuoro]] || [[word:fapuvujuoro|fapuvujuoro]] || [[word:fapuvushuoro|fapuvushuoro]] || [[word:fapuvukuoro|fapuvukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
